name: discord_linked_roles_account
comment: Stores Discord OAuth2 links between wiki user accounts and Discord user accounts for the DiscordLinkedRoles extension.

columns.name: dlra_user_id
columns.comment: Local wiki user ID (references user.user_id). Unique per wiki account.

columns.name: dlra_discord_user_id
columns.comment: Discord user snowflake ID as a string. Unique per Discord account.

columns.name: dlra_discord_username
columns.comment: Last known Discord username or display name, used in the status UI.

columns.name: dlra_scopes
columns.comment: Granted OAuth scope string for diagnostics.

columns.name: dlra_connected_at
columns.comment: Unix timestamp when the link was first created.

columns.name: dlra_updated_at
columns.comment: Unix timestamp when the row or token was last updated.

columns.name: dlra_last_sync_at
columns.comment: Unix timestamp of the last successful metadata sync. NULL if never synced.

columns.name: dlra_last_sync_error
columns.comment: Short error summary from the last failed sync, or NULL if last sync succeeded.
